title: Mini Explosives
description: This datapacks makes it that some creepers will be smaller in size.
body:
# Description:
This datapack makes it that 30% of all creepers that is loaded will have there size cut in half.

## Stats:
These are the stats a mini creeper would have
- Hearts: 8
- Explosion Radius: 1
- Scale: 0.65
- movement speed: -0.01
- Follow Range: 8

## Future:
The future of this datapack, will be of course focused on updating this to as many versions as possible.

### Notes:
~~All versions before 1.21 will require the mod [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)!~~
